# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We are committed to making participation in this project a harassment-free experience for everyone.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Welcome different viewpoints and experiences.
- Give and receive feedback professionally.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks
- Trolling or insulting comments
- Publishing private information without consent

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing standards of acceptable behavior and may take corrective action in response to inappropriate behavior.
